title: Rosina Fumo viene in città... per farsi il corredo
original_title: Rosina Fumo viene in città... per farsi il corredo
overview: Rosina, a beautiful and naive girl from Abruzzo, is sent to Rome for services, but her assiduous lover is violent, unleashing the anger of her daring boyfriend, Sandrone.
